use_cases: Hero sections with scroll-driven text animation that creates depth and visual interest
Quote or testimonial displays with skew and horizontal motion effects on scroll
Landing page typography that responds to user scroll velocity with physics-based animation
Long-form content sections with parallax text effects to engage readers
Portfolio or creative showcase pages with dynamic text reveals
ai_summary: A scroll-driven parallax text component that transforms typography based on scroll position and velocity. Uses Framer Motion's useScroll, useVelocity, and useTransform hooks to create a horizontal movement effect with skew transformation that responds to scroll speed. The component features physics-based spring animations for smooth, organic motion with configurable mass, stiffness, and damping values. Ideal for creating immersive reading experiences with animated quotes or hero text on landing pages.
